message:
feat(engine): add 208 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Twenty-first batch of enrichment tests:

- supremacy_evidence_bundle: 42 tests (hash sensitivity, coverage
  edge cases, receipt chains, integrity validation, strict mode)
- supremacy_verdict_engine: 38 tests (SPRT boundaries, side-constraint
  violations, verdict configs, observability mode filtering)
- swarm_control_loop: 41 tests (wave transitions, risk budgets,
  bottleneck detection, conservative mode, artifact determinism)
- synthesis_budget: 44 tests (phase budgets, utilization tracking,
  exhaustion rates, registry operations, history eviction)
- synthesis_kernel_promotion: 43 tests (gate evaluation, soft
  rejection, ledger lifecycle, demotion receipts, batch processing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
